priority_domains: HF radar / search and rescue; coastal hazards / resilience; maritime transportation / PORTS; HABs / shellfish and water quality; offshore wind and marine operations
starter_research_question: What source-backed evidence shows how MARACOOS data, products, or observing assets support decisions with economic relevance in the Mid-Atlantic?
source_targets: MARACOOS product pages and annual reports; U.S. IOOS regional association materials; NOAA/NOS/CO-OPS/NWS/NCCOS; USCG SAROPS and district materials; state coastal and environmental agencies; port authorities and maritime pilot associations; peer-reviewed valuation or value-of-information studies; BEA MESA, ENOW, NOEP, BTS, and USACE baseline data
evidence_gap: Need regional rows that distinguish direct MARACOOS attribution from broader Mid-Atlantic ocean economy exposure.
prompt_notes: Start with decision-use evidence and conservative claims; economic baselines are context only unless the source links observations to decisions or benefits.
